# 自覺症狀問卷回覆範例 - 臺灣健康檢查資料交換實作指引 (Taiwan Health Assessment Implementation Guide, TWHA IG) v0.1.0

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 自覺症狀問卷回覆範例

Profile: [自覺症狀問卷回覆 Profile](StructureDefinition-TWHA-QuestionnaireResponse.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): example-symptoms-response
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[Questionnaire[https://twcore.mohw.gov.tw/ig/twha/Questionnaire/example-questionnaire|0.1.0]](Questionnaire-example-questionnaire.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)q1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)q2
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "example-symptoms-response",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["https://twcore.mohw.gov.tw/ig/twha/StructureDefinition/TWHA-QuestionnaireResponse"]
  },
  "questionnaire" : "https://twcore.mohw.gov.tw/ig/twha/Questionnaire/example-questionnaire",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/example-worker"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-03-01T09:00:00Z",
  "author" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/example-worker"
  },
  "source" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/example-worker"
  },
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "q1",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "q2",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  }]
}

```
